title: teline segonnei
intro: Teline segonnei, also known as Adenocarpus decorticans, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Teline segonnei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
